title: 【天皇賞春】スティンガーグラスが回避 友道康夫調教師「歩様が、いつもより力強さに欠ける感じで…」 ([Tenno Sho Spring] Stinger Glass withdraws. Trainer Yasuo Tomomichi: "His gait felt a bit less powerful than usual...")
アランカールは引き続き武豊とのコンビで5・24オークスへ【次走報】 (Alan Curl will continue to partner with Yutaka Take for the Oaks on May 24th [Next Race Report].)
角田大和と小林脩斗が5月1日付でフリーに (Yamato Tsunoda and Shuto Kobayashi go freelance as of May 1st.)
ルメールが自身のブランドPRで博多来訪 連覇を狙う天皇賞のヘデントールは「心配いらないよ」 (Lemaire visits Hakata for his brand PR. He says "No worries" about Hedenthorl, aiming for consecutive Tenno Sho victories.)

【天皇賞春・枠順確定】GⅠ連勝狙うクロワデュノールは4枠7番、武豊アドマイヤテラは2枠3番 ([Tenno Sho Spring - Post Position Confirmed] Crois du Nord, aiming for consecutive G1 wins, is in Gate 7 (4th frame), Yutaka Take's Admire Terra is in Gate 3 (2nd frame).)
【天皇賞春・調教後馬体重】アドマイヤテラは10キロ増、ヘデントールは12キロ増、クロワデュノールは2キロ減 ([Tenno Sho Spring - Horse Weight After Training] Admire Terra is up 10kg, Hedenthorl is up 12kg, Crois du Nord is down 2kg.)

【天皇賞春・枠順の明暗】ヴェルミセルは父ゴールドシップのV時と同じ1番枠 吉村圭司調教師「いいところ」 ([Tenno Sho Spring - Post Position Fortune] Vermicelli is in Gate 1, the same as her sire Gold Ship when he won. Trainer Keiji Yoshimura: "A good spot.")

【天皇賞春・枠順の明暗】アドマイヤテラは歴代最多Vの2枠3番 武豊に全権委任で雨予報も「問題ない」 ([Tenno Sho Spring - Post Position Fortune] Admire Terra is in Gate 3 (2nd frame), the most successful gate in history. Yutaka Take has full discretion, and despite rain forecast, says "No problem.")
NHKマイルCに出走予定のオルネーロは津村明秀との新コンビへ【次走報】 (Ornero, slated to run in the NHK Mile Cup, will form a new partnership with Akihide Tsumura [Next Race Report].)

【天皇賞春・記者の特注馬】ゴールドシップ産駒の〝優等生〟ヴェルミセル 落ち着き武器に史上初の父娘制覇へ！ ([Tenno Sho Spring - Reporter's Featured Horse] Gold Ship's "honor student" Vermicelli aims for the first-ever father-daughter victory, using her calmness as a weapon!)
ザッツPOG2026【8】サンデーレーシングゆかりの血統で注目はチェスティーノ 父は新種牡馬エフフォーリア (That's POG 2026 [8] | Chettino, from a bloodline related to Sunday Racing, is one to watch. His sire is new stallion Efforia.)

【NHKマイルC1週前追い切り】ギリーズボール動き軽快 2馬身先着エコロアルバは横山和も好感触「さすが重賞馬」 ([NHK Mile Cup - 1 Week Before Training] Gillies Ball moves lightly. Ecolo Alba, two lengths ahead, also gets good remarks from Kazuo Yokoyama: "As expected of a stakes winner.")

【完全版・天皇賞春枠順の明暗】「理想的な枠」「もう少し内が…」「外の方が良かった」各陣営の感触は？ ([Full Version - Tenno Sho Spring Post Position Fortunes] "Ideal gate," "A bit more inside...", "Outside would have been better" - what are the feelings from each camp?)
石神深一助手が〝黒い帽子〟で新たなホースマン生活をスタート「覚えることが多くて…」 (Assistant Shinichi Ishigami starts a new horseman life with a "black hat" (new role/status), saying "There's so much to learn...")
カランダガンと再戦の期待も膨らむ！ マスカレードボールが香港で見せた「価値ある2着」 (Expectations for a rematch with Carandagan are rising! Masquerade Ball showed a "valuable second place" in Hong Kong.)

【東京プリンセス賞】ヘスペリスが断然人気アンジュルナを破って重賞初Ｖ 吉原寛「長い距離で力を発揮できるタイプ」 (【Tokyo Princess Stakes】Hesperis defeats overwhelming favorite Anjelina for first graded win. Hiroshi Yoshihara: "She's the type that can show her strength over longer distances.")

川田将雅騎手が障害馬術競技で5位入賞 現役時に7度騎乗のミッキーメテオとのコンビ ファンから拍手 (Jockey Yuga Kawada finishes 5th in show jumping competition, partnering with Mickey Meteor, whom he rode 7 times during its racing career, to applause from fans.)
17年にジャパンC制覇 シュヴァルグランが注目の障害馬術デビュー 吉田勝己代表も興奮「すごい人気ですね」 (Cheval Grand, 2017 Japan Cup winner, makes anticipated show jumping debut. Katsumi Yoshida, representative, also excited: "He's very popular!")
シュトラウス、マスカレードボールなど香港遠征の日本馬5頭が帰国…検疫へ JRA発表 (Five Japanese horses including Strauss and Masquerade Ball return from Hong Kong expedition... heading for quarantine. (JRA announcement))
白毛の3歳牝馬ジャジャミンが5月9日に初陣へ 鞍上は今村聖奈騎手 (White-coated 3-year-old filly Jajamin to make debut on May 9th, ridden by Sena Imamura.)
04年当時最高額4億9000万円で落札のザサンデーフサイチが死ぬ 22歳 母エアグルーヴの良血 (The Sunday Fusaichi, sold for then-record 490 million yen in 2004, dies at 22. Well-bred son of Air Groove.)

【天皇賞・春】武豊騎手のアドマイヤテラは過去最多13勝の3番枠 陣営「豊さんに任せておけばいいと思っています」 (【Tenno Sho (Spring)】Yutaka Take's Admire Terra in Gate 3, which has produced a record 13 winners. Camp: "We believe we can leave it to Yutaka-san.")

【天皇賞・春】スティンガーグラスが歩様の違和感で回避 今後は宝塚記念視野 友道調教師「いつもより力強さに欠ける感じ」 (【Tenno Sho (Spring)】Stinger Glass withdraws due to gait discomfort. Takarazuka Kinen now in sight. Trainer Tomomichi: "Feels less powerful than usual.")

高杉吏麒騎手が障害馬術競技で2位「参加することができてよかったです」減点なく巧みな飛越、走行を披露 (Jockey Riki Takasugi finishes 2nd in show jumping competition: "It was great to be able to participate." He showcased skillful jumping and riding without deductions.)

【NHKマイルC・1週前】ダイヤモンドノットに福永調教師自らが騎乗 順調な仕上がりに「東京の1600メートルで走る...」 (【NHK Mile Cup - 1 Week Out】Trainer Yoshito Fukunaga rides Diamond Knot himself. Satisfied with preparations: "Running 1600 meters at Tokyo...")
南米の名手ゴンサルベス「目標は20勝」今週から短期免許で騎乗「“ゴンちゃん”と呼んで」 (South American ace Goncalves: "My goal is 20 wins." Riding with a short-term license from this week: "Call me 'Gon-chan'.")

【天皇賞・春】JRA現役最高長身・176センチ松本大輝騎手「走りたいように走らせてあげたい」ミステリーウェイ巻き返しへ (【Tenno Sho (Spring)】JRA's tallest active jockey, 176cm Daiki Matsumoto: "I want to let Mystery Way run as it wants." Mystery Way aims for a comeback.)

武豊が力強く宣言「４日連続で重賞制覇を狙ってみたい」 先週の土日重賞Ｖに続き、京王杯ＳＣ、天皇賞・春も (Yutaka Take powerfully declares: "I'd like to aim for graded race wins for four consecutive days." Following graded wins last weekend, he targets Keio Hai Spring Cup and Tenno Sho (Spring).)

武豊騎手が馬術競技のゲスト解説 アスクワイルドモア、マンオブスピリットなどとの再会に「いろんな思いがありますね」 (Jockey Yutaka Take is a guest commentator for an equestrian competition. On reuniting with Ask Wild More, Man of Spirit, etc.: "I have many emotions.")
メイショウタバル凱旋門賞視野、武豊「頑張ります」トークショーで大歓声 (Meisho Tabaru eyeing Prix de l'Arc de Triomphe, Yutaka Take says "I'll do my best" to huge cheers at a talk show.)
【注目馬動向】エンブロイダリーが引き続きルメール騎手とのコンビでヴィクトリアマイルへ (【Notable Horse Movements】Embroidery continues partnership with jockey Christophe Lemaire for Victoria Mile.)
ローシャムパークは香港遠征の鞍上がボウマンに決定 シュヴァルグランで17年ジャパンCを制した名手 (Roshampark's jockey for Hong Kong expedition decided to be Bowman, the master jockey who won the 2017 Japan Cup with Cheval Grand.)
武豊が「ウマ娘」声優とトークショー 「切り取られるから…」“コンプラ発言”でファン沸かす (Yutaka Take holds a talk show with "Uma Musume" voice actors. Fans excited by his "compliance comment": "Because it will be taken out of context...")
セレクト3.1億円の良血 キングノジョーがオープン昇級狙う (King No Jo, a well-bred horse bought for 310 million yen at Select Sale, aims for promotion to Open class.)

【天皇賞・春】“盾男”武豊騎手とアドマイヤテラに追い風!過去最多勝の2枠3番に G1・4勝目狙うクロワデュノールは4枠7番 枠順決定 (【Tenno Sho (Spring)】Tailwind for "Shield Man" jockey Yutaka Take and Admire Terra! In Gate 3, which has the most past winners. Croire du Nord, aiming for 4th G1 win, in Gate 7. Gate draw decided.)

武豊騎手が皐月賞の秘話を披露!?「オレがワールドプレミアで勝ったから…」 父キタサンブラックのクロワデュノールにも「同じことが...」 (Jockey Yutaka Take reveals secret story about Satsuki Sho!? "Because I won with World Premiere..." To Croire du Nord, son of Kitasan Black, he says "the same thing...")
小林脩斗騎手が美浦・奥平雅士厩舎所属からフリー、角田大和騎手が栗東・角田晃一厩舎所属からフリー転向 (Jockey Shuto Kobayashi goes freelance from Miho-Masashi Okuhira stable; jockey Yamato Tsunoda goes freelance from Ritto-Koichi Tsunoda stable.)
【天皇賞(春)・調教後馬体重】アドマイヤテラは514kg、クロワデュノールは520kg (【Tenno Sho (Spring) - Post-Workout Weight】Admire Terra 514kg, Croire du Nord 520kg.)

「武豊役の武豊です!」レジェンドがウマ娘声優と共演 新CMも自信の出来で「もうすぐ公開。もう撮り終わっています。面白いと思います」 ("I'm Yutaka Take, playing Yutaka Take!" The legend co-stars with Uma Musume voice actors. Confident about the new commercial: "It will be released soon. We've finished filming. I think it's interesting.")
【ケンタッキーダービー】フルエフォート出走取消 オシェリが繰り上がりで出走枠へ (【Kentucky Derby】Full Effort scratched; O'Shaughnessy moves up into the field.)
【注目馬動向】桜花賞5着のアランカール オークスでも武豊騎手とのコンビ継続 (【Notable Horse Movements】Allancart, 5th in Oka Sho, continues partnership with jockey Yutaka Take for Oaks.)
【地方競馬】東京プリンセス賞 へスペリスが“絶対女王”を差し切ってダート牝馬クラシックの１冠を獲得 (【Local Racing】Tokyo Princess Stakes: Hesperis overtakes "absolute queen" to win the first leg of the dirt filly classics.)
羽田盃を制したフィンガーが美浦に帰厩 一夜明けて田中博調教師が「よく寝ています」と明かす (Finger, winner of the Haneda Hai, returns to Miho stable. The morning after, trainer Hiroshi Tanaka reveals: "He's sleeping well.")

Henry Dwyer’s European experiment began with Asfoora. After two seasons, three elite sprint wins and a European Champion Sprinter title, it has now evolved into a Newmarket satellite stable designed to test and develop selected European purchases before they head to Australia.

Atlantic Emerald, the only daughter of Champion 3YO Filly Atlantic Jewel, topped the inaugural digital session of Inglis's new format for the Australian Broodmare Sale on Thursday. Selling for $410,000, the mare was one of five mares in foal to sell for $100,000 or more, while a share in Champion Sire Zoustar sold for $850,000.

Renegade, a son of seven-time USA Champion Sire Into Mischief, is the pre-post favourite for Saturday’s G1 Kentucky Derby despite drawing unfavourably in one. TDN have all the information you need for the 152nd Run For The Roses.
The latest Bred To Win episode recaps late autumn racing highlights, showcases global performances, and features an in-depth chat with Hallmark Stud’s Denny Baker on breeding success and tradition.

Yulong has acquired Segenhoe Stud while unveiling its full 2026 service fees, expanding into the Hunter Valley with a roster led by Devil Night and Private Harry. The new base will be supported by established sires including Alabama Express, as part of a powerful two-state operation.

Vinery and Kia Ora will combine their stallion operation to be based at Vinery with all fees to be announced later this week. G1 Oakleigh Plate winner Tropicus joins the roster in 2026, creating a ‘dynamic and unified’ roster.

With the 2026 breeding season fast approaching, Rich Hill Stud has unveiled a streamlined and proven four-horse roster, headlined by Proisir, as the farm leans into performance, consistency and commercial relevance across Australasia.

Blueblood mare Ertijaaj impressed on the Caulfield Heath, while a tough debuting 3-year-old by Zoustar and a pair of promising juveniles added further intrigue to solid midweek racing across Australia
